allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/ugmjaamgjfpkssaphwxl/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_93502a285457630cd97cb08275ac645599cfca2d" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""select count\(*\) as total, count\(image_url\) as with_image, count\(year\) as with_year from events;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/ugmjaamgjfpkssaphwxl/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_93502a285457630cd97cb08275ac645599cfca2d" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = ''''public'''' order by table_name;""}')
